extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER HOORN Taco won from the breakaway after going solo with under 3km to go, peloton misjudged his strength by over 30 seconds
tactical_patterns: Bora-Hansgrohe paced aggressively early to drop sprinters for Sagan, but their effort backfired as it set up breakaway victory.
Peloton miscalculated van der Hoorn's strength by 30+ seconds with 2km to go despite controlling gap to 19s at final climb.
Solo attacks inside final 3km from breakaway remnants succeeded because chasing groups were caught and absorbed into peloton dynamics.

rider_signals.VAN DER HOORN Taco: positive: Unemployed in December, went solo under 3km maintaining 22-second gap with 1km remaining against organized peloton
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: Dropped on unclassified 7.1% climb with 15km remaining despite stage suiting sprint characteristics
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Finished third despite Bora setting tempo all day to thin sprinter field on climbs
rider_signals.CIMOLAI Davide: positive: Won bunch sprint for second, showing resilience after peloton's tactical miscalculation
